data.name: Exiori
data.detailed_description:
Exiori is a JRPG with turn based combat that contains hentai elements, It also has an interesting story that will take place throughout 7 separate chapters.

Follow the story of Krosuji, a young man/woman with amnesia who was mysteriously thrust into another unknown world known as Teseldaima two years ago. Battle alongside or against new and old allies/enemies from Euclyca and other Team Syukino works. Battle throughout 7 different chapters as Krosuji tries to find their way back home, locate the legendary relic known as the Exiori and get revenge.

Embark on a multi-world adventure that features several cameos from different Team Syukino games.

Features:

-Seven Story Chapters. (Eight if you count the prologue).

-Auto save feature.

-Turn-Based Combat.

-A colorful cast of characters with 5 in battle at once.

-Wonderful Soundtrack.

-Several optional NSFW Straight, Gay, Bi, Lesbian sex scenes.

-Ability to turn off random encounters on the fly in options.

-Limit Breaks.

-A big over-world to explore.

-Character Bios.

-Originally drawn characters and assets.

-Several Weapons, Items and Armor to unlock and equip.

data.short_description: Fight alongside a colorful cast of unique characters as you embark on a multi-world adventure to find the legendary relic known as the Exiori to avenge your friend and return home in this hentai-esque JRPG.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: OS: Microsoft Windows® 8.1/10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Processor: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

data.legal_notice: Exiori is the sole property of Team Syukino.
